chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1054 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For directions 1.For orders on CMA 826/23 2.For orders on CMA 827/23 07-12-2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, counsel for petitioners and under his instructions does not press listed applications, which are accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
